creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* Grzegorz Blach (magik@roorback.net) wrote:

> >Description:
> I have created new port with small gimp plugin.

- Does not build:
http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/gimp-save-for-web-0.28.6.log
you probably want to LIB_DEPEND on gimp, see other gimp-* ports for
example.

- Locale files should be installed into share/locale, not lib/locale.
Also it'd be good to make them optional as portlint suggests.
Note that it's usually more convenient to have small changes via
REINPLACE_CMD instread of a patch.

- No WWW in pkg-plist

-- 
Dmitry Marakasov   .   55B5 0596 FF1E 8D84 5F56  9510 D35A 80DD F9D2 F77D
